docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $333.39 FILED BY SMITH-EMERY COMPANY,INC. AS TO DEFENDANT A & B CONSTRUCTION INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT A & B CONSTRUCTION INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH-EMERY COMPANY,INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT A & B CONSTRUCTION INC. $333.39 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $398.39 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
